purpose: Wiring proposed by Phase 1 docs and Phase 1.6 simulation findings that does NOT yet exist in agent frontmatter. Each item has provenance: 'proposed' (with source citation). Phase 2 implementation MAY land any subset; this file documents intent.

trackToHandoff._source: phase1-aks-automatic-grounding.md Part 9.2 + tracks.json patterns; not in agent frontmatter

proposedAgentChanges.change: set user-invocable: true; add readiness-mode tools (core.read_skill, core.read_file, core.inspect_repo, core.helm_template, core.kustomize_build, core.assess_aks_cluster); permit diff proposal in readiness mode; add github.publisher handoff for review-pack delivery; add core.codesmith asTools (max 3) for diff generation
proposedAgentChanges.source: Sim #2 S1, Sim #7 S1, Sim #12, grounding artifact D7

proposedAgentChanges.change: add tools: core.read_skill, core.read_file, core.priorDeploymentContext (Phase 3); add handoff to aks.reviewer (for SRE handover review-pack scope per D7)
add tools: core.read_skill, core.search_kaito_models, azure.pricing_lookup, azure.estimate_cost, azure.quota_lookup (Phase 3); add asTools to core.triage (max 1) for track-flip handback
proposedAgentChanges.source: Sim #1 S5, Sim #3, Sim #5, Sim #6, Sim #8 (track-flip)

proposedAgentChanges.change: add tools: core.read_skill, azure.quota_lookup; add asTools to aks.architect (max 3) — symmetric to existing aks.architect → azure.architect wiring
add tools: aks.validate_manifests, aks.validate_safeguards, azure.validate_bicep, core.read_skill; add asTools to aks.architect (max 3)
add tools: core.read_skill; add asTools to azure.architect (max 2) for cost cross-checks; add asTools to aks.architect (max 2) for cluster-side correctness checks

add tools: github.update_pr_description (Phase 3), github.add_pr_comment (Phase 3), github.set_pr_label (Phase 3), github.assign_reviewer (Phase 3), github.set_repo_var (Phase 3); add asTools to azure.architect (max 3) for pre-publish cost questions
proposedAgentChanges.source: Sim #1 S10, Sim #11, Sim #12 + Phase 1 wiring gap

wiringGaps.description: azure.architect has no asTools wiring to aks.architect; must hand off for AKS-specific questions. Cross-cluster questions in Sim #10 and Sim #11 had to either guess or refuse.
wiringGaps.suggestedFix: Add asTools entry maxTurns:3 symmetric to existing aks.architect → azure.architect

wiringGaps.description: No agent has triage as a handoff target; if user changes track mid-conversation (Sim #8: 'use Container Apps instead') the current agent has no clean route. Sim #8 worked because architect reshaped locally — but Phase 2 needs explicit rule for when to handback vs reshape.
wiringGaps.suggestedFix: Either add triage as handoff target on every architect, or formalize 'named-different-service → reshape locally; named-different-shape → handback via new event'. See Phase 2 plan agent-coordination divergence #2.

wiringGaps.description: core.codesmith only consults reviewer via asTools (max 3 turns); no formal handoff path. Today the harness auto-runs reviewer post-codesmith, which substitutes for the missing handoff but isn't visible to agents.
wiringGaps.suggestedFix: Either add explicit codesmith → reviewer handoff for cases needing formal sign-off, OR document the harness auto-reviewer hook in agent-coordination-decisions.md so prompt authors don't try to add manual handoff calls.

wiringGaps.description: github.publisher has no asTools to azure.architect; cannot answer pre-publish cost questions without refusing or handoff.

Per D7, aks.reviewer should own readiness scope (load azure-kubernetes-automatic-readiness skill, propose diffs in readiness mode, expand tools list). Current frontmatter is narrowly scoped to 'safeguard review only'.
wiringGaps.suggestedFix: Update frontmatter per Phase 2 plan agent #3 (aks.reviewer rewrite). Set user-invocable: true; add tools: core.read_skill, core.read_file, core.inspect_repo, core.helm_template, core.kustomize_build, core.assess_aks_cluster, github.api_get, github.update_pr_description; add asTools to core.codesmith (max 3) for diff generation; add handoff to github.publisher for review-pack delivery.
wiringGaps.source: Phase 1.5 grounding D7 + Sim #2 S1 + Sim #7 + Sim #12

wiringGaps.description: Triage has no rule for recognizing iteration on prior Kickstart deploys (Sim #9). Falls into greenfield architect-plan flow, which re-proposes the cluster.
wiringGaps.suggestedFix: Add Mode Recognition section to triage prompt + populate priorDeploymentContext via core.priorDeploymentContext (Phase 3 tool) or core.inspect_repo+core.read_file (Phase 2 fallback). See Phase 2 plan agent #1.

wiringGaps.description: Triage has no rule for recognizing PaaS-migration intent (Sim #10, #11). Defaults to repo_uplift handler which is too generic.
wiringGaps.suggestedFix: Add paas_migration sub-track + R3 mapping table opening composition + load azure-cloud-migrate skill.

wiringGaps.description: Triage has no rule for recognizing multi-app bulk scenarios (Sim #11). Would handle as 3 independent conversations.
wiringGaps.suggestedFix: Add bulk mode + R-shared-infra-decision opening composition + R-bulk-sequenced-PRs.

wiringGaps.description: Phase 2/3/4 resume hooks (Sim #2 Turn 22 'message me Phase 2', Sim #7 Turn 14) need session-scoped migration_phase state. Without it, 'Phase 2' is just a string.
wiringGaps.suggestedFix: Add migration_phase: 1|2|3|4 to harness session state; triage recognizes phase-numbered messages.
